task_completion.description: Log into Rocket.Chat as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat web interface is visible, and the user profile or sidebar indicates the agent is logged in as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Establish incident command as required by NIMS/ICS principles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message sent by the admin declaring the establishment of incident command, or the creation of a dedicated incident command channel.

task_completion.description: Review and reply to operational alerts in the designated alert channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Messages sent by the admin in threads within the 'clinical-it-alerts', 'nursing-coordination', and 'it-security-ops' channels.

task_completion.description: Send direct messages to specific targets to protect patient safety communications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Direct message chat windows or history showing messages sent by the admin to 'clinical.coordinator' and 'it.security'.

task_completion.description: Coordinate with all required stakeholders for the incident response.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chat history showing mentions, direct messages, or channel coordination involving 'clinical.coordinator', 'it.security', 'nursing.supervisor', and 'ciso'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser showing the Rocket.Chat GUI is used to navigate and send messages, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Messages were actually sent in the chat.
integrity.visual_evidence: Messages appear in the chat history as sent by the admin, not just typed into the message input box without being sent.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste the task description as a message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sent messages are contextually appropriate incident response communications, not a direct copy-paste of the task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the Rocket.Chat interface. To successfully complete the task, the agent must reply to threads in exactly these three alert channels: 'clinical-it-alerts', 'nursing-coordination', and 'it-security-ops'. The agent must also send Direct Messages (DMs) to 'clinical.coordinator' and 'it.security'. Finally, the agent must coordinate with the following required users: 'clinical.coordinator', 'it.security', 'nursing.supervisor', and 'ciso'.
